official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound player_abilities fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official player_abilities body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns player_abilities to packet id 0x40.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the player_abilities id to ClientboundPlayerAbilitiesPacket.
The official player_abilities body is one flags byte followed by flyingSpeed float and walkingSpeed float.
The fixture uses primitive ability fields and does not require an initialized player.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded flags/speeds, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove initialized player ability semantics, movement readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer initialized player ability semantics, movement readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
